auto_fix.status: 2 FINDINGS DOCUMENTED: ENSEMBLE_WR_DEGRADATION_ALERT (conf=80%, gate=0% monitoring) and SIZE_META_LEARNING_BIN_GRANULARITY_AUDIT (conf=80%, gate=0% dev task). Root cause fixes from prior runs (SIDE_BIAS_ENFORCEMENT_V2 + HIGH_LEV_10X_FORENSICS_BLOCK) are the active interventions. Both new rules are monitoring/documentation flags.

fixes_detail.description: Flagged: ensemble strategy WR = 30% on 27 recent trades (conf=0.80). Root causes already addressed by SIDE_BIAS_ENFORCEMENT_V2 and TRENDING_MIN_HOLD. Monitor post-restart trades 1-50. Escalate to circuit breaker if WR < 35% persists.
fixes_detail.expected_impact: If SIDE_BIAS + TRENDING_MIN_HOLD are effective, ensemble WR should recover from 30% toward 45%+ within first 50 post-restart trades.

fixes_detail.description: Documented meta_learning bug: single threshold bins mix profitable 3-5x leverage (+$0.79/trade) with losing 6-10x (-$0.38/trade), creating false negative signals for the best leverage band. HIGH_LEV_10X_FORENSICS_BLOCK correctly handles the real risk. Dev task: use tier-binned leverage analysis.
fixes_detail.expected_impact: After dev fix: meta_learning generates accurate per-tier insights, preventing future noise rules that could incorrectly penalize profitable 3-5x positioning.

new_findings_this_run.detail: ensemble strategy WR = 30% on recent 27 trades vs 57% all-time. 27pp degradation from historical baseline. Root causes: (1) 74% LONG bias — LONG WR=30% — already addressed by SIDE_BIAS_ENFORCEMENT_V2. (2) Likely non-trending regime contamination (illiquid=28.1% WR, ranging=25%). These are the combined primary leak.
new_findings_this_run.action: MONITORING FLAG. Root cause fixes applied in prior runs. Post-restart: track trades 1-50. Circuit breaker trigger if ensemble WR < 35% after 30 trades.

new_findings_this_run.source: insights.json bias claims vs execution_forensics.json leverage tier data
new_findings_this_run.detail: Meta_learning claims >2.1x leverage = -$3.46 avg PnL (conf=0.80). Forensics shows 3-5x = +$0.79/trade POSITIVE (n=68). Contradiction resolved: meta_learning bins 3-5x and 6-10x together. The 6-10x tail (-$0.38/trade, n=91) contaminates the calculation. HIGH_LEV_10X_FORENSICS_BLOCK already correctly handles this. Forensics data is more reliable (granular tier analysis).
new_findings_this_run.action: DEV TASK: fix meta_learning leverage insight generator to use tier bins. ~2h. Prevents future false bias signals on profitable 3-5x range.
